hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, os
path = os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH', os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_file_path', ''))
if path.endswith('.py'):
    import py_compile
    try:
        py_compile.compile(path, doraise=True)
        print(f'Syntax OK: {path}')
    except py_compile.PyCompileError as e:
        print(f'SYNTAX ERROR: {e}', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
"

python3 -c "
import os
path = os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH', os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_file_path', ''))
if path.endswith(('.py', '.js')):
    with open(path) as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
    count = len(lines)
    if count > 750:
        print(f'FILE TOO LONG: {path} has {count} lines (max 750)', file=__import__('sys').stderr)
        __import__('sys').exit(1)
    elif count > 500:
        print(f'WARNING: {path} has {count} lines (target <500, max 750)')
"

python3 -c "
import os, subprocess, sys
path = os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH', os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_file_path', ''))
spatial_files = ['spatial_awareness.py', 'execute.py', 'converse.py', 'manager.py']
if any(path.endswith(f) for f in spatial_files):
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'tests/check_spatial_integrity.py'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(result.stdout)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print(result.stderr, file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
"

python3 -c "
import os, subprocess, sys
path = os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH', os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_file_path', ''))
trigger_files = ['pathfinding.py', 'generator.py', 'spatial_awareness.py', 'execute.py', 'npc_renderer.js', 'manager.py']
if any(path.endswith(f) for f in trigger_files):
    # Run unit-level movement tests
    r1 = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'tests/simulation/test_npc_movement.py'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
    print(r1.stdout[-1500:] if len(r1.stdout) > 1500 else r1.stdout)
    if r1.returncode != 0:
        print('MOVEMENT UNIT TESTS FAILED', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
    # Run live simulation (300 ticks, observes actual NPC behaviour)
    r2 = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'tests/simulation/test_live_simulation.py'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=120)
    print(r2.stdout[-1500:] if len(r2.stdout) > 1500 else r2.stdout)
    if r2.returncode != 0:
        print('LIVE SIMULATION FAILED', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
"

python3 -c "
import os, subprocess, sys
path = os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH', os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT_file_path', ''))
trigger_files = ['decompose.py', 'execute.py', 'manager.py', 'models.py', 'llm_client.py']
if any(path.endswith(f) for f in trigger_files):
    r = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'tests/simulation/test_npc_intelligence.py'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=120)
    print(r.stdout[-1500:] if len(r.stdout) > 1500 else r.stdout)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print('INTELLIGENCE TESTS FAILED', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
"
